x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Each additional channel extends AI self-service reach.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_channel");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=3?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active VA channels",finding:n<3?"Only "+n+" VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI should be deployed across multiple channels for maximum self-service reach.":n+" VA channels -- Now Assist reaches employees across "+n+" deployment channels."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1c
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Each additional channel extends AI self-service reach.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>VA Channel Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_channel");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=3?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active VA channels",finding:n<3?"Only "+n+" VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI should be deployed across multiple channels for maximum self-service reach.":n+" VA channels -- Now Assist reaches employees across "+n+" deployment channels."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module> <number>CHK0006130</number> <order>50</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1c</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
